label: Liquidity Provision
description: Add or remove liquidity from DeFi pools. Pool selector, fee tier, price range, TVL, and APR display.

0.6.note: isLoading={false} stub wired to FormWidget (synchronous context; clear backend-swap point). Matches defi-lending pattern.

l0.notes: All 9 checks pass. Error boundary: WidgetErrorBoundary covers all grid widgets globally. requiredEntitlements: [defi-trading]. availableOn: [defi]. No any types or @ts-ignore. No lib/mocks imports in widget file. Loading: context does not expose isLoading; FormWidget shows skeleton when isLoading prop is set; marked N/A for context-level loading. Empty state: guard on !pool (fixed: removed '(mock)' text). Error state: FormWidget shows dismissible error banner from useFormSubmit — covers submission errors; context has no error field. No dead code.

1.3.note: adjustedLiquidityPools memo returns [] when !hasDefiDesk (fixed in defi-data-context.tsx).

1.4.note: clientIds destructured and acknowledged; LiquidityPool has no clientId field — full narrowing requires schema change (BP-5).

1.5.note: strategyIds filter applied to tradeHistory; LiquidityPool has no strategyId field so pool-level strategy filter is N/A.

1.6.note: empty scope arrays return all data.

1.7.note: KNOWN-GAP: LIQUIDITY_POOLS constant in lib/mocks/fixtures/; moving to lib/constants/ is BP-5 scope.

l1.notes: 1.1 PASS: data via useDeFiData() hook. 1.2 PASS: context calls useGlobalScope(). 1.3 PASS: adjustedLiquidityPools memo returns [] when !hasDefiDesk (fixed in defi-data-context.tsx). 1.4 PARTIAL: clientIds destructured and acknowledged; LiquidityPool has no clientId field — full narrowing requires schema change (BP-5). 1.5 PARTIAL: strategyIds filter applied to tradeHistory; LiquidityPool has no strategyId field so pool-level strategy filter is N/A. 1.6 PASS: empty scope arrays return all data. 1.7 KNOWN-GAP: LIQUIDITY_POOLS constant in lib/mocks/fixtures/; moving to lib/constants/ is BP-5 scope.

l2.notes: Covered globally by commits 32ba8ab (structured {domain, tier} entitlements across all 17 register.ts files + 5 PageEntitlementGate wrappers) and f9f29ea (65 automated tests in __tests__/integration/entitlement-wiring.test.ts, __tests__/components/platform/*entitlement-gate.test.tsx, __tests__/lib/config/trading-entitlements.test.ts). Re-audit per-widget only if the wiring test fails or entitlements are added.

3.1.note: live ✓ / paper ✓ / batch: ADD/REMOVE buttons should be disabled.

3.2.note: Context reads useGlobalScope() but does not consume scope.mode.

3.5.note: Paper mode spec: execute disabled; pool TVL/APR still displayed.

l3.notes: 3.3/3.4: Human must verify batch-mode button disable.

4.1.note: Add/Remove liquidity buttons and fee tier buttons functional.

5.1.note: Target strategies: MARKET_MAKING_CONTINUOUS (Uniswap V3 concentrated LP). Operations: ADD_LIQUIDITY, REMOVE_LIQUIDITY. Fee tiers: 0.01%, 0.05%, 0.3%, 1%.

l5.notes: 5.2-5.6: Human walkthrough required. Price range inputs need verification.

l6.notes: L1.5 harness spec: 11 tests covering root testid mount, pool TVL/APR render, empty state, operation toggle (ADD/REMOVE), fee tier group, execute button enable/disable (empty/zero/positive amount), and executeDeFiOrder payload shape. See tests/widgets/defi/defi-liquidity-widget.test.tsx

7.2.note: No mock data in widget file.

7.5.note: Out of scope — English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21; 7.5 reassigned to UTC datetime rendering

8.1.note: text-[10px] migrated to text-micro utility backed by --text-micro token (0.625rem) in globals.css @theme. Current usages after 2026-04-21 refactor: line 47 (pool TVL/APR sublabel in Select), 85 (fee tier description text), 98 (min-price unit label), 110 (max-price unit label), 122 (position-size unit label).

8.3.note: Button, Input, Select from components/ui/*. FormWidget shared primitive used. CollapsibleSection wrapper around TVL/APR removed in 2026-04-21 refactor — pool metrics are now always visible.

8.4.note: Agent: no img without alt. Inputs have label wrappers. Human: keyboard pass required.

keepSeparate.rationale: LP provision is a distinct action flow from staking/lending. Pool-specific price range config is unique to this widget.

dataContract.notes: Pool TVL/APR should refresh on interval:60s in production.

gaps.notes: MARKET_MAKING_CONTINUOUS §13 DeFi (per chain)/lp (PASSIVE_LP — Curve / Balancer / Uniswap V2): IL dynamics need archetype sub-section
MARKET_MAKING_CONTINUOUS §13 DeFi/perp: DeFi perp MM not exposed as third-party role (protocol-level MM on Hyperliquid / GMX)
MARKET_MAKING_CONTINUOUS §13 DeFi/option: No supported DeFi options venue

findings.description: Empty state message contained '(mock)' text — removed.
liquidityPools not filtered by org scope — fixed: adjustedLiquidityPools memo returns [] when !hasDefiDesk.

findings.fix: Retired 7.5 i18n check: English-only UI per product decision 2026-04-21

findings.description: defi-liquidity-widget.tsx:69,86,102,112 — text-[10px] for sub-xs label sizing in fee tier buttons and pool info.
findings.fix: Replaced text-[10px] with text-micro Tailwind utility backed by --text-micro token (0.625rem) added to globals.css @theme.

findings.description: Layout refactor 2026-04-21: (a) promoted Pool Select to the top of the form (was below the Add/Remove action row); (b) moved Add/Remove liquidity buttons immediately below the pool; (c) consolidated Min price / Max price / Position size into a single 3-col grid with equal-width h-8 inputs; (d) removed the CollapsibleSection wrapper around TVL / 24h APR / Pool fee tier so pool metrics are always visible.
FormWidget was not receiving isLoading — drift vs. defi-lending widget which had the stub wired for parity and clarity on the backend-swap point.
findings.fix: Added `const isLoading = false;` stub and wired `isLoading={isLoading}` on FormWidget. Matches defi-lending pattern; single swap point when real data source is wired.

l1FixedBy: defi-data-context.tsx — adjustedLiquidityPools memo with hasDefiDesk guard

changelog.summary: Layout refactor: Pool Select promoted to top; Add/Remove liquidity moved below pool; Min price / Max price / Position size consolidated into 3-col grid; CollapsibleSection around TVL/APR removed (pool metrics always visible). Parity fix: isLoading={false} stub added to FormWidget to match defi-lending. Cert drift fixes: 7.3 line count 190→189, 8.1 text-micro line refs updated (47/85/98/110/122), 8.3 CollapsibleSection removal noted.
